name: Apple Honey Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
Honeysauce:
2 tablespoons butter
2 tablespoons shortening
1/4 teaspoon salt
1/4 teaspoon cinnamon
1/4 teaspoon nutmeg
1. Pare and core the apples.
2. Sift flour with baking powder and salt; cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add milk, mixing until a soft dough is formed.
4. Roll dough into a 12 x 8 inch rectangle.
5. Cut into six squares.
6. Place an apple in each square.
7. In a small bowl, combine butter, honey, lemon juice, and salt; blend well.
8. Fill the centers of apples with the mixture.
9. Moisten edges of dough with cold water.
10. Bring four corners of dough over the apples, pressing edges firmly together to seal.
11. Place dumplings in a greased 10 x 10 x 2 inch pan.
12. In another saucepan, combine butter, shortening, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg; add enough water to make 1 1/2 cups of liquid.
13. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat to maintain a simmer for 5 minutes.
14. Pour the hot sauce evenly over the dumplings.
15. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and tender.
